app.name: pyfakefs
app.one_liner: Provides a fake file system that mocks the Python file system modules.

screens.name: Fake Filesystem Test Interface
screens.purpose: Allows developers to run tests against an in-memory fake filesystem that mimics real OS behavior.
primary_actions: Map real files into fake filesystem

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Simulates saving a file in the fake filesystem (mapped to internal write operations).

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core in-memory filesystem structure
week 1: Integrate with pytest via fixture
week 1: Support basic file read/write operations
acceptance_tests: File seeking returns correct offset after sequential reads
os.path.realpath works correctly on Windows with fake paths
secrets.randbelow does not fail under PyPy when pyfakefs is active
VCCode unittest runner executes tests without compatibility errors
